attributes.action: Reduce Fuel Duty to Offset Iran War Price Increases
attributes.additional_details: Fuel prices have risen sharply due to global instability, which directly impacts the cost of living across the UK. When fuel costs increase, it affects not only drivers but also the price of goods- that the general public have to face. It is unfair and is caused by an illegal war. By decreasing fuel duty it eases the financial burden for all consumers.
attributes.background: I want the Government to temporarily reduce fuel duty to help offset rising petrol and diesel prices linked to global instability.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Suspend fuel duty and VAT on fuel until the Iran conflict ends" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763674

You may also be interested in the following petition: "Reduce fuel duty tax to at least half of the current rates" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764577
